name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.05: Discounts & deals engine. New deals table + CRUD API (markdown / expiry-tiered / multi-buy / combo), AG-admin Deals page (kiosk-control group) with the approved card UI + 4-type composer (targeting, fleet/machine scope, always/date/hours schedule, best-single-discount stacking). Active machine-scoped deals exposed in the kiosk config (configVersion bumped on change); kiosk enforces at point of sale — single-item markdowns now, basket deals once kiosk checkout ships.
